snapshot.title: Signals in the fog
snapshot.creative_concept: Observe changing lights before counting them.
snapshot.hook: A signal disappears before the class can count it.
snapshot.viewer_value: The class needs a reliable way to track every light.
snapshot.course_anchor: Count visible objects once without omission.
snapshot.classroom_first_question: How can we count every light exactly once?
snapshot.handoff_moment: Stop when all lights become visible together.
must_not_preteach: Do not state the counting method.
snapshot.fit_reason: The observation creates a concrete counting need.
risks: Keep the number of lights within five.

data.reason: Selected by a teacher through the runtime API.
